name: CrowdStrike Falcon Surface
description: Adversary-driven external attack surface management using 24/7 internet scanning to discover and assess unknown internet-facing assets with advanced attribution techniques

actions.name: List External Assets
actions.description: Retrieve discovered external-facing assets including IPs, domains, and services

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: FQL filter expression for asset search

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of asset IDs to return

actions.name: Get External Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information for one or more external assets by their IDs

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: One or more asset IDs to retrieve details for

actions.name: List External Exposures
actions.description: Retrieve security exposures and risks found across external assets

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Search Domains
actions.description: Search for discovered domains and subdomains in the external attack surface

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: FQL filter for domain search (e.g., asset_type:'DOMAIN'+name:'example.com')

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Risk Score
actions.description: Retrieve the overall external risk score and risk factors for the organization

actions.name: List Findings
actions.description: Retrieve security findings including misconfigurations, exposed services, and vulnerabilities

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
